offer: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient data compilation causes inaccurate monthly reports. We automate the extraction and compilation of utility bill data instead of manual data entry and report generation.
problem: Inefficient compilation of utility bill data into monthly reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant community
